name: Reply to Inline PR Comments
query: How do I reply to inline comments on PR #30 in Sense/cursor-starter-kit?
expected_behavior: Step 1: Provides GraphQL query to get review thread IDs
Step 1a: Shows query with repository owner, name, and PR number
Step 1b: Explains thread ID vs comment ID difference
Step 2a: Demonstrates proper reply format with ✅ prefix
Step 2b: Explains how to reference the thread ID
Step 3a: Provides batch resolve example for multiple threads
Step 4: Shows verification query to check all threads resolved
success_criteria: Provides complete GraphQL query for getting threads
Shows mutation for replying to threads (not just comments)
Explains difference between REST and GraphQL API
Provides troubleshooting for common errors (404, permissions)
